description: Wave 27B: P1 prologue expansion — 3 named supporting characters. Only proceed after Wave 27A anchors are accepted. These characters appear in the prologue but are not the proof set.
generation_method: Phase 1 txt2img discovery, Phase 2 anchor curation, Phase 3 img2img/IP-Adapter follow-on
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes
negative_base: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

identity_lock.face_shape: square jaw, deep lines around eyes from decades of command, grey-blue eyes direct and unwavering, early fifties
identity_lock.hair_head_structure: silver at temples, military-cut, greying but distinguished not aged
identity_lock.body_language: command posture, hands clasped behind back or at attention, the stillness of someone who does not need to prove anything
identity_lock.costume_silhouette: Compact Fleet captain's dress uniform, dark navy with silver trim, high collar, long coat variant, captain's insignia polished
non_negotiable_details: impeccable uniform — the institution personified, not a crease out of place
worn leather logbook in breast pocket — Maren's gift, he still carries it
direct eye contact — he faces what he does, that is the cruelty

shots.scene_function: establish the mentor-turned-trap — authority that reads as trustworthy because it was built to
shots.prompt: portrait head and shoulders, detailed face, military man in his early fifties, silver at temples, grey-blue eyes direct and unwavering, deep lines around eyes from decades of command, square jaw, military-straight posture, Compact Fleet captain's dress uniform in dark navy with silver trim, high collar, captain's insignia polished, the kind of face that inspires trust because it was built to, authority masking controlled regret, conviction masking guilt, isolated on plain dark grey background
shots.negative_additions: casual clothing, visible emotion, disheveled, villainous expression, cape, dramatic lighting, young, handsome hero, smirking

shots.scene_function: full uniform truth — he IS the institution
shots.prompt: full body visible, front-facing view, military man in his early fifties with silver at temples, Compact Fleet captain's dress uniform in dark navy with silver trim, captain's insignia polished, high collar, fitted cut, long coat variant for senior officers, worn leather logbook visible in breast pocket, officer's sidearm in regulation holster, polished black boots, standing with hands clasped behind back, command posture, charcoal coat over navy uniform, the uniform is spotless because the institution demands it, isolated on plain dark grey background

shots.scene_function: Solen on the Ardent bridge — command in its natural habitat
shots.prompt: military man in his early fifties with silver temples in dark navy captain's uniform standing at a Compact Fleet carrier bridge, steel-blue wall panels, regulation lighting strips, hands clasped behind his back reviewing a tactical display, grey-blue eyes focused, the leather logbook visible in his breast pocket, officers at stations around him, institutional competence personified, the bridge of TCS Ardent, cool regulation lighting

identity_lock.face_shape: square face, jaw set, compact powerful build, forty, small scars on hands and knuckles
identity_lock.hair_head_structure: grey-streaked short-cropped hair, close military cut with visible grey
identity_lock.body_language: fills doorways with certainty not size, always scanning, hands busy checking gear
identity_lock.costume_silhouette: Compact NCO flight suit, practical and well-worn, reinforced at shoulders and knees, equipment pouches on thighs and chest, no officer trim
non_negotiable_details: grey-streaked cropped hair — twenty-year veteran marker
hand scars — small battle scars on both hands from two decades of tight-quarters work
standard-issue everything maintained perfectly — NCO pride, not officer polish

identity_lock.face_shape: earnest young face that shows every emotion, late twenties, slight build
identity_lock.body_language: focused downward when working, hands move with medical precision, always near her med kit
identity_lock.costume_silhouette: Compact Fleet medical uniform, white-over-blue, slightly rumpled from long shifts, medical department patch on shoulder
non_negotiable_details: med kit always present — slung over one shoulder, her tool belt equivalent
slightly rumpled uniform — she works, she does not polish
expressive face — she cannot hide what she feels, which makes the court martial silence worse
